hero.name: Sarunpat Sangpak
hero.description: Specializing in building exceptional digital experiences

about.p1: Hello! I'm a Computer Science student with a strong interest in full-stack web development and a passion for learning real-world software development practices. I have experience building SEO-friendly web applications using Next.js, developing responsive user interfaces with Tailwind CSS, and working with NoSQL databases, RESTful APIs, dynamic routing, and clean URL structures (slug-based). I enjoy solving problems, debugging applications, and collaborating with teams to improve my development skills. I am eager to contribute to a development team while continuously learning and growing as a developer.
about.p2: My goal is to build clean, performant, and accessible user interfaces that solve real-world problems. When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, writing technical blogs, or enjoying a good cup of coffee.
